notes: Hyper-local station set for racing out of Bristol Harbor, RI: tight harbor courses out around Hog Island and Poppasquash Point into the East Passage.

tide_station.name: Newport (Narragansett Bay reference)
tide_station.note: Bristol Harbor high water lags Newport by only a few minutes; Newport is the reliable harmonic reference station.

wind_obs.name: Conimicut Light
wind_obs.note: Nearest real anemometer, ~3 mi N up the East Passage.

offshore.name: Block Island (NDBC 44097)
offshore.note: What's arriving from the south / open-ocean context.
